# Planner Decisions — IoT Gateway (pilot) Line

*Generated by `planning/planner.py` from customer requirements.*

## Inputs

| Input | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Product | IoT Gateway (pilot) |
| Daily output | 200/day |
| Automation | semi |
| Floor area | 180 m² |
| Workers | 5 |
| Quality | optical |
| Regulated | False |
| Budget | low |

## Decisions

| Decision | Result | Rule | Rationale |
|----------|--------|------|-----------|
| Automation tier | semi | automation_level.level (normalized) | Declared automation is 'semi'; 40 units/worker/day → tier drives which automated stations are viable. |
| Parallel assembly | 1 | single station meets takt | One assembly station (cap ≈ 480/shift) covers 200/day. |
| Robot handling cell | NO | low automation & throughput | Automation 'semi' and 200/day do not justify a robot → no robot cell. |
| Vision inspection | YES | quality mentions ['optical', 'vision', 'camera', 'high'] OR regulated; budget ≥ low | Quality/regulatory needs objective optical inspection → include vision. |
| Functional test | NO | quality mentions ['functional', 'electrical', 'test', 'flow'] OR regulated; budget ≥ low | No functional-test / regulatory requirement → skip functional test. |
| Compact layout | NO | area ≤ 150 m² | Ample 180 m² floor → standard spacing. |
| Floor-area feasibility | 30.0 | sum(station area) ≤ available area | Stations need ≈ 30 m²; available 180 m². |

## Resulting line (5 stations, standard layout)

- **S01** — Loading Station
- **S02** — Assisted Assembly Station
- **S03** — Vision Inspection Station
- **S04** — Packaging Station
- **S05** — Finished Goods Storage

Flow: S01 → S02 → S03 → S04 → S05  (+X)
